headline: USPS to align dimensional pricing closer to FedEx, UPS
summary: The agency plans to round up any fraction of an inch for several of its services, part of a wave of changes set to impact package shippers on July 12.

headline: UPS (UPS) Q1 Revenue Hits $21.2B With $1.27B Operating Profit
summary: United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $100. On April 28, United Parcel Service reported Q1 2026 consolidated revenues of $21.2 billion, with a consolidated operating profit of $1.27 billion and a non-GAAP adjusted operating profit of $1.32 billion.
